text: Hi, Esha. So I'm recording this video to give you the solution of the pivot table issue. So here, if you click on anywhere and go to change data source, you will see that the report is only taking the only the T column. So the data source is wrong. What you have to do, you have to change the data source from. To the whole thing. So it may be V. W doesn't matter. You have to check the last over here. So it is first V. But I put W doesn't matter. So then, okay, maybe I have to put V. Okay. Okay. So now it has changed. And you will see that April is coming over here. So, yeah, you have to choose from A to V. That's it. So that was the issue. Thank you.
